creator: cejkar@fit.vutbr.cz
text:
Minor style fixes to sun4v.sgml: Use first letter in upper case and end the item with a dot. --- www/en/platforms/sun4v.sgml.orig Tue Nov 14 02:01:53 2006 +++ www/en/platforms/sun4v.sgml Tue Nov 14 02:02:13 2006 @@ -71,7 +71,7 @@
  • Load balance interrupts between CPUs.
  • Add support for the serial port.
    • -
  • system reset and exit to OFW need to be implemented (use sc to reset)
    • +
  • System reset and exit to OFW need to be implemented (use sc to reset).

Pointers Of Interest
